needTwoCtSeries: At least two CT series with images are required for side-by-side comparison. Load a study that contains multiple CT series.
modeValidationFail: Requires at least one CT series
copyLinkNoSeries: Select baseline and compare series first.
layoutMemoryClearedBody: Next visit will use automatic layout until you choose again.
footerHelp: Series may have different slice counts; sync approximates alignment by anatomy. If coverage is limited, the nearest slice is shown with a warning.
syncWarningOutOfRange: Limited coverage on the compare side; showing the nearest slice (~{{mm}} mm deviation).
errorSameSeries: Choose two different CT series (baseline and compare cannot be the same).
reconstructHint3d: The baseline series is not suitable for volume reconstruction; the bottom 3D view may be empty — use the left 2D stack as reference.
reconstructHint2d: The baseline series is not suitable for volume reconstruction; 3D is not available in this layout.
